description_long: This chest of drawers features a robust, rectangular structure with a dark wood finish and three spacious drawers, each equipped with a prominent, cylindrical bar pull handle. The wood grain is visible across the surfaces, giving it a natural and slightly rustic appearance. The top section includes an open shelf, providing additional storage or display space. The sides and back are constructed from the same dark wood, with the back panel appearing slightly lighter in tone. The handles are metallic with a warm, bronze-like finish, contrasting subtly with the dark wood. The overall design is functional and sturdy, suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or garages.
description: A dark wood chest of drawers with three large drawers, bar pull handles, and an open top shelf. The design is sturdy and functional, with visible wood grain and metallic handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with bar pull handles and an open shelf above.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid, textured wood panel and the depth of the drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, lighter-toned wood back panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the wood grain and the thickness of the side panels.
